rubric_items.reasoning: All 6 criteria are met via direct, root-cause fixes rather than workarounds: the two Jobs were unsuspended via kubectl patch (durable — the underlying job spec is fixed, not just a one-time pod), the monitor deployment's bad image (busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999) was corrected by rolling back to the last-known-good revision (busybox:1.36), the ConfigMap and Secret values were patched to valid, non-expired values, and the core spark-master/worker cluster was left untouched at 1/1 replicas. Final verification output confirms all pods Running/Completed and values correct, and the oracle independently verified pass.

The visible portion of the log shows a clean, logical sequence: verify current state of each resource, fix secret and configmap, explicitly note completion ('Secret and ConfigMap fixed. Now let's un-suspend the two Jobs.'), unsuspend both jobs, poll pod/job status, wait for job completion with kubectl wait, then run one comprehensive final verification covering all 6 criteria. No backtracking, contradictions, or trial-and-error is evident in this segment; the monitor deployment fix via rollout undo implies the agent had already inspected rollout history before this tail, consistent with a diagnose-then-fix approach.

Every mutation used a targeted, least-privilege command: kubectl patch --type merge for the two job suspend flags, kubectl patch for the configmap/secret values, and kubectl rollout undo --to-revision=1 for the monitor deployment (exactly matching the task's suggested tool list). Verification used only read-only commands (get pods/jobs/deployments, jsonpath queries, kubectl wait). No broad deletes, force flags, or out-of-scope mutations — activity log confirms only 5 mutations against 53 reads.

Exactly 5 mutations were made, one per required fix (secret patch, configmap patch, two job unsuspend patches, one deployment rollback) — no collateral or redundant changes, no YAML files touched, and spark-master/worker were left completely alone as instructed. This is a minimal, tightly-scoped solution with no extraneous churn.
